name: notebook-fundamental
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && grep -qxF "export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" ~/.zshrc || echo "export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" >> ~/.zshrc && grep -qxF "export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" ~/.bashrc || echo "export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" >> ~/.bashrc && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv sync --frozen && if [ "${INSTALL_TORCH_CUDA:-0}" = "1" ]; then uv pip install --python "${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python" --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu124 torch; fi'
